task_completion.description: Agent identifies and excludes the contaminated participant 'sub-99' from the analysis.

task_completion.description: Agent includes all 20 valid participants in the analysis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code processing the full dataset without dropping any valid participant IDs, or the final JSON showing entries for 20 distinct participants.

task_completion.description: Agent computes Alerting, Orienting, and Executive Control scores for each valid participant using correct trials only.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code showing filtering for correct trials (e.g., `accuracy == 1`) and the calculation of the three scores using the subtractive method (Alerting = nocue - double; Orienting = center - spatial; Executive = incongruent - congruent).

task_completion.description: Agent computes the group mean scores for Alerting, Orienting, and Executive networks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code aggregating the individual scores to compute the mean for each of the three networks across all valid participants.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the final results in a valid JSON file at /home/ga/pebl/analysis/ant_report.json.

integrity.description: Agent actually computes the scores rather than hardcoding fake results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of a script (Python, R, etc.) or spreadsheet formulas performing the calculations, rather than just typing a JSON file manually with arbitrary numbers.

integrity.description: Agent uses the specified file paths for input and output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The script or commands explicitly reference `~/pebl/data/ant_data.csv` and `/home/ga/pebl/analysis/ant_report.json`.

integrity.description: Agent does not simply download a pre-computed JSON file from an external source.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal history or browser history does not show downloading the final answer; the work is done locally.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: The contaminated participant to exclude is 'sub-99'. There are 20 valid participants. The output must be saved to '/home/ga/pebl/analysis/ant_report.json'. The calculations must be based on correct trials only. Tolerances for correctness are 12.0ms for individual scores and 8.0ms for group means.
